chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6685 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.28514/2020 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel notice issued by the revenue authority has been impugned herein, however, same shall be contested by the petitioner before the issuing authority. Learned counsel states that the notice may be adjudicated after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
